_readme: This file controls which characters are loaded by hanzi-engine.html.
Edit any section to add/remove characters, then run: python3 build_words.py
Sections are merged in order — duplicates are automatically removed.
Use --hsk flag to generate lighter builds: python3 build_words.py --hsk 1 2

hsk1.meaning: classifier indicating a small amount or small number greater than 1: some
can (i.e. have the skill, know how to)
you (informal, as opposed to courteous 您[nin2])
particle indicating that a previously asked question is to be applied to the preceding word ("What about ...?"

hsk2.meaning: you (courteous, as opposed to informal 你[ni3])

hsk3.meaning: the Xia or Hsia dynasty c. 2000 BC
prefix used before the surname of a person or a numeral indicating the order of birth of the children in a family or to indicate affection or familiarity
generic word for peoples or states of south China or south Asia at different historical periods
